2603.18627.title: Agentic Flow Steering and Parallel Rollout Search for Spatially Grounded Text-to-Image Generation
2603.18627.paper_summary: Precise Text-to-Image (T2I) generation has achieved great success but is hindered by the limited relational reasoning of static text encoders and the error accumulation in open-loop sampling. Without real-time feedback, initial semantic ambiguities during the Ordinary Differential Equation trajectory inevitably escalate into stochastic deviations from spatial constraints. To bridge this gap, we introduce AFS-Search (Agentic Flow Steering and Parallel Rollout Search), a training-free closed-loop framework built upon FLUX.1-dev. AFS-Search incorporates a training-free closed-loop parallel rollout search and flow steering mechanism, which leverages a Vision-Language Model (VLM) as a semantic critic to diagnose intermediate latents and dynamically steer the velocity field via precise spatial grounding. Complementarily, we formulate T2I generation as a sequential decision-making process, exploring multiple trajectories through lookahead simulations and selecting the optimal path based on VLM-guided rewards. Further, we provide AFS-Search-Pro for higher performance and AFS-Search-Fast for quicker generation. Experimental results show that our AFS-Search-Pro greatly boosts the performance of the original FLUX.1-dev, achieving state-of-the-art results across three different benchmarks. Meanwhile, AFS-Search-Fast also significantly enhances performance while maintaining fast generation speed.
2603.18627.paper_summary_zh: 精確的文本到圖像（T2I）生成已取得巨大成功，但受到靜態文本編碼器的有限關聯推理和開環取樣中的錯誤累積的阻礙。<lb/>在沒有實時反饋的情況下，常微分方程軌跡中的初始語義模糊不可避免地升級為與空間約束的隨機偏差。<lb/>為了彌補這一差距，我們介紹了AFS-Search（主動流引導和並行展開搜索），這是一個基於FLUX.1-dev的無需訓練的閉環框架。<lb/>AFS-Search結合了無需訓練的閉環並行展開搜索和流引導機制，利用視覺-語言模型（VLM）作為語義評論來診斷中間潛變量，並通過精確的空間基礎動態引導速度場。<lb/>作為補充，我們將T2I生成公式化為一個序列決策過程，通過前瞻模擬探索多條軌跡，並根據VLM引導的獎勵選擇最佳路徑。<lb/>此外，我們提供了AFS-Search-Pro以獲得更高性能，以及AFS-Search-Fast以實現更快的生成。<lb/>實驗結果顯示，我們的AFS-Search-Pro大幅提升了原始FLUX.1-dev的性能，在三個不同基準上達到了最先進的結果。<lb/>同時，AFS-Search-Fast也顯著提高了性能，同時保持快速生成速度。
2603.18627.author: Ping Chen et.al.
2603.18627.authors: Ping Chen, Daoxuan Zhang, Xiangming Wang, Yungeng Liu, Haijin Zeng, Yongyong Chen
